subcodes.first_line: O friends! Verily I say unto you, whosoever in this day is deprived of the outpourings from the heaven of divine mercy shall never [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان براستی میگویم هر که الیوم از فیوضات سماء رحمت الهی ممنوع شد هرگز
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
